text:
Market today: The mood is cautious with ASML earnings kicking off tech and a potential Fed rate hike looming. These are the real drivers for your tech/chip heavy book today.

Your holdings: SOXL is a "SELL" at -24.46%, and SPAL is "NEW" but already down -27.71%. Both are leveraged, and margin amplifies these significant drops. Remember SPAL is a brand-new, very volatile IPO.

Watch: Keep an eye on ASML's earnings for chip sector sentiment and any fresh Fed commentary on rates.

Bottom line: Prioritize risk management on your leveraged, underwater positions amidst market uncertainty.
plays: SOXL: With a -24.46% loss and "SELL" status, consider trimming this leveraged position. Re-evaluate your stop at 200, as margin amplifies drops.
SPAL: Your new leveraged SPAL position is down -27.71%. Given its volatility and decay, review your stop at 21.38 for potential risk reduction.
No new buys today - hold and watch. No compelling catalyst for new entries, and scanner setups are mixed.
